280.reason: [When a single '&' is encountered, curTokenType is never assigned before this line, leading to a null or undefined token type being stored in the token. This causes incorrect behavior or potential runtime issues even though an error is recorded.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [When a single '&' is encountered, curTokenType is never assigned before this line, leading to a null or undefined token type being stored in the token. This causes incorrect behavior or potential runtime issues even though an error is recorded.]

294.reason: [Same issue as above: when a single '|' is encountered, curTokenType is uninitialized, yet a Token is still created and added to tokens, which violates the specification that erroneous inputs should only produce error output and no tokens.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue as above: when a single '|' is encountered, curTokenType is uninitialized, yet a Token is still created and added to tokens, which violates the specification that erroneous inputs should only produce error output and no tokens.]
